about.description: At HYDE, we believe that the absence of light heightens the senses. Our culinary approach focuses on texture, aroma, and the purity of seasonal ingredients.

menu.title: Autumn Menu
menu.quote: "Taste is the only sense that requires the soul."

reviews.subtitle: Google Reviews
reviews.review1: A perfect blend of ambiance and gastronomy. Every bite is art, and the cocktails are a story of their own. The best place in Herzegovina.
reviews.review2: An atmosphere that transports you to another world. Top-level service, and the dry-aged ribeye is absolute perfection.
reviews.review3: Botanical noir concept in its full glory. From entrance to dessert, an experience that awakens all senses. We are definitely coming back.

seo.title: HYDE bar & dine | Botanical Noir in Ljubuški
seo.description: Experience top-tier gastronomy and a botanical noir atmosphere in the heart of Herzegovina. Book your table.
seo.menuDescription: Discover our menu — dry-aged meats, fresh ingredients, and botanical cocktails in the heart of Ljubuški.

noScript: For the full Botanical Noir experience, please enable JavaScript in your browser.
